## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] `pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/integration` passes locally
- [ ] Linter passes (`ruff check custom_components/ tests/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Version bumped in `manifest.json` (if shipping a release)
- [ ] `strings.json` / `translations/en.json` updated (if adding new UI strings)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or device-specific config committed
